texto: Have you ever taken a good look at a public garbage can in Paris, a paving stone in Rio de Janeiro, or a doorway in Dublin? Trust me -- the man or woman responsible for making those utilitarian objects was creating art.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Shawn Coyne que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Have you ever taken a good look at a public garbage can in Paris, a paving stone in Rio de Janeir…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, art, taken, com foco em reflexao.
